strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of open-source GIS platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, public speaking)
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise; only recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field
Career level appears senior/staff rather than director-level IC with strategic advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of versatile full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience, entrepreneurial drive through GISCollective, and a strong craftsmanship and knowledge-sharing profile. However, the resume shows only recent and limited engagement with AI/ML work, lacks an advanced AI-related degree, and does not evidence the director-level strategic advisory scope this Principal role requires. Fit is partial: strong engineering foundation, weaker on the AI-strategy dimension central to the position.
